commit.subject: LU-18535 ptlrpc: do not use kstrndup()
commit.message:
LU-18535 ptlrpc: do not use kstrndup()

instead use OBD_ALLOC() + memcpy() so subsequent OBD_FREE() does
correct math to detect memory leaks.
